description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden stock featuring a dark brown finish and visible grain. The stock is fitted with a leather shell holder, which is strapped to the side and holds several shotgun shells for quick reloading. A leather sling is attached to the shotgun, running from the buttstock to the front of the barrel, allowing for easy carrying. The receiver and lever mechanism are made of metal, with the lever loop clearly visible below the trigger guard. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, providing a seamless transition for operation. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both practical use and display.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long blued barrel, wooden stock, leather shell holder, and attached sling. The design is classic and functional, with visible metal and wood components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, wooden stock with leather shell holder, and attached sling.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the lever-action mechanism, wooden stock, and the full length of the barrel and sling.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, leather shell holder, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and round with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, integrated with the lever, smooth with no finger grooves
